commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Remaining work is contributor proof plus maintainer product/security/CI ownership, not a narrow automated repair on the branch.; Needs attention: The diff has no discrete exploit finding from source review, but it introduces a new mobile credential/WebView/direct-provider boundary that needs explicit maintainer security ownership before merge. (sha=605571fd32e41ae087fa22427f0a835a32ab51ad)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a native SwiftUI iOS app under `mobile/` with CrabboxKit, an embedded Go CLI bridge, islo sandbox and assistant flows, mobile docs/assets/scripts, and new mobile CI jobs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new native mobile feature PR, not a bug report with a failing current-main reproduction. The relevant verification is current-head simulator/device proof, which is still missing.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Remaining work is contributor proof plus maintainer product/security/CI ownership, not a narrow automated repair on the branch.

target.title: feat: native SwiftUI Crabbox iOS app (crabbox.sh client + on-device/sandbox LLM + islo)
target.body:
## Summary

Adds an early native SwiftUI iOS client under `mobile/` with a testable `CrabboxKit` core, embedded mobile-safe Go CLI bridge, islo-backed sandbox workflows, coordinator/portal access, and local/on-sandbox assistant support.

Current maintainer repairs on top of the contributor branch tightened the merge boundary:

- `crabbox.sh` is treated as portal/workspace control, not as the current sandbox lifecycle provider.
- Sandbox chat engines are registered only after readiness checks pass and are removed by handle-specific identity on stop.
- Provider selection keeps disabled islo keys inert and keeps crabbox.sh tokens out of sandbox lifecycle calls.
- Credential-bearing endpoint normalization rejects URL userinfo and malformed loopback HTTP hosts before tokens/API keys are attached.
- Default examples are provider-neutral.
- Shared XCTest and no-XCTest `crabbox-sim` coverage covers provider toggle policy, map-reduce planning/reduction, sandbox readiness gating, engine identity cleanup, and endpoint policy.

## Current Verification

Local validation on current head `605571fd32e41ae087fa22427f0a835a32ab51ad`:

```text
swift build
swift run crabbox-sim --json
# 18 scenarios, 74 steps, 0 violations

go test ./mobile/go/crabboxmobile

git diff --check
```

Maintainer M1 validation on an exact shallow clone of current head:

```text
HEAD=605571fd32e41ae087fa22427f0a835a32ab51ad
swift test
# Executed 49 tests, with 0 failures (0 unexpected)

swift run crabbox-sim --json
# ok=true, scenarios=18, totalSteps=74, violations=0

xcodegen generate
# xcodegen=ok
```

Public CI is green on current head:
https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/actions/runs/28109885247

## Current Limitation

Unsigned iOS simulator build proof is blocked on the available M1 host because Xcode is installed but the iOS simulator platform runtime is missing:

```text
xcodebuild_exit=70
error=iOS 18.4 is not installed. To use with Xcode, first download and install the platform
```

This is not visual simulator/device proof.

## Remaining Merge Gate

Do not merge while `status: needs proof`, `merge-risk: security-boundary`, `merge-risk: automation`, or `proof: video` remain.

This still needs redacted current-head simulator/device proof or explicit maintainer acceptance that the Swift/Xcode-side proof above is sufficient for this mobile feature. Product acceptance is also needed for the editable endpoint/security ownership and mobile CI ownership boundaries.
target.author: zozo123

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: vincentkoc
